author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: Added 'Try It: Your First Rust Program' section to the end of the Language Landscape chapter. Walks through: cargo new, cargo run to see Hello World, then two agent-directed modifications (add name input with greeting, then add a loop until quit). Ends with edge-case prompts (empty input, long string) to practice verification. Explicitly framed as scratch work, not portfolio. Gives them familiarity with the cargo workflow before Phase 2.
